title: Add WebhookEvents retention/cleanup policy
body:
The WebhookEvents collection will grow indefinitely as webhook events are recorded. Consider adding a TTL index on `receivedAt` or a background job to purge old records older than N days (e.g., 90 days). This should be documented in the collection's admin description.

Location: `src/server/payload/collections/WebhookEvents.ts`
rationale: Unbounded storage growth can lead to performance degradation and increased storage costs

title: Add Stripe payment_intent lookup to PayPal refund path
body: PayPal refunds for capture-based payments store `paymentIntentId` on the transaction (populated from `session.payment_intent` in Stripe webhook). The PayPal refund path in `handleEvent` does not populate this field. If a Stripe transaction ever needs to be refunded via the PayPal webhook path (e.g., migrated data), the `paymentIntentId` would be missing. Consider whether `PAYMENT.CAPTURE.COMPLETED` should also accept `paymentIntentId` in metadata.
rationale: Data consistency for cross-provider transaction lookups
